evals.prompt: I need to migrate a medium-sized CLI from scripts into a package and keep progress resumable across sessions.
evals.expected_output: Decides a Goal Pack is warranted, identifies goal contract fields that cannot silently change, creates or updates goal/progress/evidence records, and names the first proof step instead of writing a speculative work item tree.

evals.prompt: Continue this Goal Pack work item and stop only if completion.required_evidence cannot be honestly verified.
evals.expected_output: Reads goal and progress, runs the largest safe useful slice inside allowed scope, verifies it, adds an evidence record, applies progress, and keeps the original objective intact.

evals.prompt: Audit whether this long-running coding goal is complete.
evals.expected_output: Maps every explicit requirement to authoritative evidence, requires a completion review evidence record with completion_satisfied true, and refuses to call completion from partial progress.
